Title: The Island of Thule, 1937
Short Description: Play the Iron Sentinel, Pulsar, Marksman, Kee Master, The Vigilant, Memnoch, and Kid Phantasm in a mission to investigate the island of Thule before the Nazis in this Basic Marvel Super Hero game.
Long Description: After the heroes saved President Roosevelt from the 5th Column menace, Col. Ward asks the collected heroes to access a newly formed island in the North Atlantic that the Nazis have called Thule. Players will play pre-generated heroes in this adventure. Role-Playing and Combat will be highlighted.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Demo Night & Social Mixer
Short Description: A chance to demo games & meet w/some of your favorite TRD exhibitors and presenters. Part demo, part networking, part social; join us for this culminating TRD event! A great way to end your Trade Day.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)

Title: 5th Column Strikes Washington D.C., 1937
Short Description: Play the Iron Sentinel, Pulsar, Marksman, Kee Master, The Vigilant, Memnoch, and Kid Phantasm in a mission to protect Washington, D.C. in this Basic Marvel Super Hero game based in 1937 America.
Long Description: After an unidentified blue light that waves across the globe changes the world, heroes and villains emerge. Colonel Ward has collected a team of new vigilantes to stop a menace to America from a 5th column unit in Washington, D.C. Players will play pre-generated heroes in this adventure. Role-Playing and Combat will be highlighted.
Experience Required: None (You've never played before - rules will be taught)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events

Title: Iacon in-person championship
Short Description: AUTOBOTS sleeve up, and ROLL OUT! Transformers are not dead, as long as we fight! This is a full constructed Swiss style, tcg tournament, using the official Wizards of the Coast rules and ban list.
Long Description: This event will consist of swiss pairings then a cut to top 4. Decks must contain a minimum of 40 cards and no more than 3 of each named card. Teams are to be 25 stars between bots, and star cards in the deck and only include a single bot of a complete name. The three banned cards are Multi-Mission Gear, Press The Advantage, and Swap Parts. Total prizes will be based on participation and will be displayed at the event. This brings it all together, this weeks qualifiers to crown a champion!
Experience Required: Some (You've played it a bit and understand the basics)
Attendee Registration?: Yes, they can register for this round without having played in any other events
